Ukrainian military intelligence and prisoner of war coordination sources have allegedly confirmed his custody in the Kherson region. His presence on a Ukrainian 'enemies' database has also been noted. The circumstances of his capture and potential for exchange remain unclear amidst ongoing conflict.
